name: Get OIDC Configuration
description: Retrieves OIDC discovery metadata for Autodesk's identity provider. Contains URLs for authorization, token issuance, revocation, introspection, and other OAuth-related endpoints.

name: Authorize User
description: Redirects end users to Autodesk's authorization page to authenticate and grant access. Part of the 3-legged OAuth flow. Returns an authorization code used to obtain access and refresh tokens.

query_parameters.name: client_id
query_parameters.description: Client ID of the registered app.

query_parameters.name: response_type
query_parameters.description: Must be 'code' for authorization code grant or 'id_token' for ID token flow.

query_parameters.name: redirect_uri
query_parameters.description: URL-encoded callback URI registered with the app.

query_parameters.name: nonce
query_parameters.description: Associates client session with ID token; required when scope includes openid.

query_parameters.name: scope
query_parameters.description: Space-separated list of requested scopes (e.g., data:read).

query_parameters.name: state
query_parameters.description: Arbitrary data passed back in the state query param to the redirect URI.

query_parameters.name: response_mode
query_parameters.description: Determines how the response is returned. Options: fragment, form_post, query.

query_parameters.name: code_challenge_method
query_parameters.description: PKCE challenge method, must be 'S256' if code_challenge is present.

status_codes.4xx: Various client errors depending on request setup.

response.body: HTML redirect and consent UI for the end user. No JSON response body.

name: Get JWKS
description: Retrieves the list of public keys in the JSON Web Key Set (JWKS) format. These keys are used to validate OAuth 2.0 access tokens. The key to validate a token is identified using the token’s 'kid' (key ID).

status_codes.200: Successful retrieval of the JWKS list.

body.kid: string, Key ID used to identify the key.
body.use: string, Use of the key (e.g., sig for signature).

name: Logout
description: Logs the user out by removing their browser session and redirects to the Autodesk login page. Optionally, a custom redirect URI can be provided to specify where the user is sent after logout.

query_parameters.name: post_logout_redirect_uri
query_parameters.description: The location to redirect once logout is performed. The provided domain host should be on the allowed list.

status_codes.302: Successful request; user redirected to the post_logout_redirect_uri or Autodesk login page.

name: Token
description: Retrieves a two-legged or three-legged access token depending on the grant type. This endpoint handles the OAuth token exchange process for various types of grants: client_credentials, authorization_code, and refresh_token.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Must be in the form Basic ${Base64(<client_id>:<client_secret>)}. Required if not passed in the body.

body_parameters.name: grant_type
body_parameters.description: The grant type, which must be authorization_code for this section.

body_parameters.name: code
body_parameters.description: The authorization code captured from the GET authorize redirect.

body_parameters.name: redirect_uri
body_parameters.description: Must match the redirect_uri used in the GET authorize request.

status_codes.200: Successful request; returns an access token.
status_codes.400: Bad Request; typically caused by malformed or missing parameters.

name: Introspect
description: Checks if the token is active and returns additional information if the token is valid. If the token is expired, invalid, or revoked, the status will be returned as inactive.

body_parameters.name: token
body_parameters.description: The token to be introspected. Required.

body_parameters.name: client_id
body_parameters.description: Required for public clients to identify the client associated with the token.

status_codes.400: Bad Request; typically caused by malformed or missing parameters.

name: Revoke
description: Revokes an access token or refresh token, rendering it inactive. Once the token is revoked, there is no response body. The client can only revoke its own tokens.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Required for private clients in the form Basic ${Base64(<client_id>:<client_secret>)}.

body_parameters.name: token
body_parameters.description: The token to be revoked. Required.

body_parameters.name: token_type_hint
body_parameters.description: Indicates the type of token being revoked, typically access_token. Required.

body_parameters.name: client_id
body_parameters.description: Required for public clients to identify the client requesting the revocation. Required for public clients only.

status_codes.400: Bad Request; typically caused by malformed or missing parameters.

name: OIDC User Info Endpoint
description: Fetches basic information for the authenticated user using a 3-legged access token.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Required: A valid 3-legged token must be included in the Authorization header.

request.parameters: No arguments are needed in the request.

status_codes.200: Successful request; returns user profile information.

body.sub: String: Oxygen id of the user
body.name: String: Full name of the user
body.given_name: String: First name of the user
body.family_name: String: Last name of the user
body.email: String: Primary email of the user
body.email_verified: Boolean: Flag indicating if the user's email is verified
body.profile: String: URL for the profile of the user
body.picture: String: Profile image of the user (x120 thumbnail)
body.locale: String: End-User's locale in BCP47 format (e.g., en-US)
body.is_2fa_enabled: Boolean: Whether two-factor authentication is enabled
body.country_code: String: Country code at account creation
body.phone_number: String: Primary phone number with country code and extension
body.phone_number_verified: Boolean: Whether the phone number is verified
body.ldap_domain: String: Domain name for LDAP users (null if not LDAP)
body.job_title: String: Job title on the user profile
body.industry: String: Industry selected in the profile
body.industry_code: String: Industry code associated with the profile
body.about_me: String: About me section on the user profile
body.language: String: Language selected by the user
body.company: String: Company listed in the profile
body.opt_in: Boolean: Whether the user opts into marketing information
body.social_userinfo_list: Array of Objects: Social provider name and identifier for social users (empty if not social)
body.thumbnails: Object: Profile image thumbnail URLs for each size
